---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve HookSniff
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain the problem.

```
// Paste relevant logs here
```

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- **Rust version**: [e.g., 1.82.0]
- **Node version**: [e.g., 20.x]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121] (for dashboard issues)
- **HookSniff version**: [e.g., v0.1.0 or commit SHA]

## API Request (if applicable)

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.hooksniff.com/v1/... \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ..." \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{ ... }'
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., frequency, impact, workarounds tried).
